title: Am-Tech L0400 - 6 Piece Precision Screwdriver Set
features: FOR DETAILED WORK: This precision screwdriver set includes a useful assortment of Phillips and slotted tips and is ideal for detailed and precision work
STORAGE CASE: It is supplied in a handy plastic storage case for easy storage and transport
SIZES: The set includes sizes 1mm, 1.2mm, 1.8mm, 2.4mm (slotted) and 3mm, 3.5mm (cross point)
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 6pc presicion screwdriver set See more

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: detailed and precision work, repairing eyeglasses, smartphones, watches, and other small electronics or devices
